steps.title: Identify the underlined claim
steps.content: The underlined claim: as nueva canción spread beyond Chile, the breadth of musical traditions incorporated into its foundation expanded. The right detail must show nueva canción drawing on a tradition from outside Chile.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: "Many demonstrate the stylistic influence of *corrido*, a genre of narrative songs from Mexico that had come to be characterized by political themes in the early 1800s." describes nueva canción songs influenced by corrido, a Many demonstrate the stylistic influence of *corrido*, a genre of narrative songs from Mexico that had come to be characterized by political themes in the early 1800s. is correct.
